title: Content Moderation & Safety
description: Implement basic content moderation system. Add is_flagged and moderation_status fields to photos. Create report photo functionality for users. Build admin-only moderation queue page to review reported content (approve/remove). Implement automated NSFW detection using AI vision on upload (flag but don't block). Add user reporting and basic ban functionality. Terms of service and community guidelines pages. Out of scope: appeal system, detailed audit logs, automated ban triggers.
